nasb.text: “It shall come about, when the Lord your God brings you into the land where you are entering to possess it, that you shall place the blessing on Mount Gerizim and the curse on Mount Ebal.

esv.text: And when the Lord your God brings you into the land that you are entering to take possession of it, you shall set the blessing on Mount Gerizim and the curse on Mount Ebal.

cnv.text: 耶和華你的　神領你進入你要佔領為業之地以後，你就要把祝福擺在基利心山上，把咒詛擺在以巴路山上。

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华带领你们进入并占领那片土地时，你们要在基利心山上宣告祝福，在以巴路山上宣告咒诅。
